mapper.insert: INSERT INTO steam_sync_task ( task_type, status, total_count, total_pages, planned_pages, synced_pages, current_page, processed_count, saved_count, updated_count, skipped_count, remaining_pages, remaining_items, max_pages_limit, failed_page, error_message, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{taskType}, #{status}, #{totalCount}, #{totalPages}, #{plannedPages}, #{syncedPages}, #{currentPage}, #{processedCount}, #{savedCount}, #{updatedCount}, #{skippedCount}, #{remainingPages}, #{remainingItems}, #{maxPagesLimit}, #{failedPage}, #{errorMessage}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM steam_sync_task WHERE task_type = #{taskType} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
